    All Classes and Interfaces

    Class
    Description
    Admin
    System administrator — manages users and views audit logs.
    Course
    Represents an academic course in the university system.
    CreditLimitException
     
    Employee
    Abstract class representing all university employees.
    Enrollment
     
    EnrollmentStatus
     
    Format
     
    GraduateStudent
    A graduate student (Master or PhD). 4th-year+ students can be assigned a research supervisor who must have h-index >= 3.
    GraduateType
     
    Journal
     
    Language
     
    Lesson
    Represents a single academic session within a course.
    LessonType
     
    LowHIndexException
     
    Main
    Console demo for the KBTU Research University Information System.
    Manager
    Academic/administrative manager.
    ManagerType
     
    Mark
     
    MaxFailsException
     
    Message
    Represents a message exchanged between employees.
    News
    Represents a news item within the university system.
    NotResearcherException
     
    Observable
     
    Observer
     
    PaperComparators
     
    Request
     
    RequestStatus
     
    Researcher
     
    ResearchPaper
    Represents a published research paper within the university's research system.
    ResearchProject
    Represents a collective research project within the university.
    ResearchStaff
    Employee who is not a teacher or student but still conducts research.
    SeniorStudent
    4th-year bachelor who can conduct research and has a supervisor.
    Student
    Represents a bachelor student in the university system.
    Teacher
    Represents a teacher/instructor in the university.
    TeacherPosition
     
    TeacherRating
    Represents a student's rating of a teacher for a course.
    Transcript
     
    UniversitySystem
    Central registry for users, courses, journals, and news.
    UrgencyLevel
     
    User
     
    UserFactory
